final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original sci-fi space illustration featuring an astronaut floating in Earth orbit (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "壮观震撼" sci-fi space aesthetic — references in the spirit of NASA Apollo-era photography heritage, Denis Villeneuve's Arrival visual grandeur, 2001: A Space Odyssey compositional scale; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include astronaut as focal subject centered or slightly off-center, space station partial structure at frame edges
Subject: must include a single astronaut floating in Earth orbit, spacesuit with clearly visible surface details
Scene/backdrop: must include Earth below in orbit, the Milky Way and nebulae as a luminous backdrop behind the astronaut
Lighting/mood: must be lit by Earth's reflected light (earthshine) as primary source — exact secondary fill and rim light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a deep-space direction with luminous nebula accents — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a high-detail surface treatment on the spacesuit — exact fabric weave, visor reflection, and panel texture is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
